abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.text: Other friendly models within 2" have cover.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

actions.name: King's Shield
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, this model may remove an Assault marker within 2" of the target to increase this action's Dmg by +1. Move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Hold Down
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action against the target.

actions.name: Lure
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward this model.

triggers.name: Preemptive Strike
triggers.text: Once per activation. Deal 2 damage to the target.

actions.name: Shield Rush
actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp in a straight line, ignoring other models, markers, and terrain. Enemy models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Lethal Aura
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Flattened
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage to models that failed to resist this action.
